menu:
android:id="@+id/search_textbox" app:actionViewClass="androidx.appcompat.widget.SearchView" android:icon="@drawable/ic_search_white_24dp" app:showAsAction="always|collapseActionView" android:title="@string/stringSearch">
android:id="@+id/cover_size" android:icon="@drawable/ic_view_module_white_24dp" app:showAsAction="always" android:title="@string/grid_item_size">
android:id="@+id/cover_size_small" android:title="@string/small"/> android:id="@+id/cover_size_normal" android:title="@string/normal"/> android:id="@+id/cover_size_large" android:title="@string/large"/> android:icon="@drawable/ic_sort_white_24dp" app:showAsAction="ifRoom" android:title="@string/stringSort"> android:id="@+id/menuSortTitle" android:title="@string/sortTitle"/> android:id="@+id/menuSortRelease" android:title="@string/sortFirstAired"/> android:id="@+id/menuSortNewestEpisode" android:title="@string/sortNewestEpisode"/> android:id="@+id/menuSortDuration" android:title="@string/sortDuration"/> android:id="@+id/menuSortRating" android:title="@string/sortRating"/> android:id="@+id/menuSortWeightedRating" android:title="@string/sortWeightedRating"/> android:id="@+id/update" android:icon="@drawable/ic_sync_white_24dp" android:title="@string/menuUpdateTitle"> android:icon="@drawable/ic_filter_list_white_24dp" android:title="@string/filters"> android:id="@+id/genres" android:title="@string/choiceGenres"/> android:id="@+id/certifications" android:title="@string/detailsCertification"/> android:id="@+id/release_year" android:title="@string/release_year"/> android:id="@+id/folders" android:title="@string/folders" /> android:id="@+id/fileSources" android:title="@string/fileSources" /> android:id="@+id/offline_files" android:title="@string/choiceOffline"/> android:id="@+id/available_files" android:title="@string/choiceAvailableFiles"/> android:id="@+id/clear_filters" android:title="@string/clear_filters"/>
